entries.title: PR Comment Toxicity Sentiment Balancer
entries.notes: Analyzes tone of PR comments and shows a dashboard of balance across team members. Built with regex sentiment + LLM fallback. Competition gap: no free tool tracks emotional balance over time in code review.
entries.pain: Code review comments with harsh tone damage team morale and slow PR merges.

entries.title: Email Thread Decay Velocity Predictor
entries.notes: Tracks open/click patterns from tracking pixels plus thread reply velocity to score likelihood. Uses browser-side signals + optional SMTP integration. Niche gap: no existing extension predicts reply probability per thread.
entries.pain: Sales reps waste days on cold email threads that will never reply, lacking signals to prioritize.

entries.title: Webhook Payload Encryption Gate
entries.notes: Intercepts outbound webhook requests and scans payloads for credit cards, SSNs, API keys, emails. Flags violations before sent. Competitors require manual review or backend scanning.
entries.pain: Developers accidentally leak PII or secrets in webhook payloads sent to third-party endpoints.

entries.title: LinkedIn Profile Update Change Alert
entries.notes: Periodically scrapes watched LinkedIn profiles and alerts on headline, company, location, or bio changes. Uses LinkedIn's public pages. Niche gap: no outreach-specific profile change tracker.
entries.pain: AEs miss timing outreach when prospects change jobs or get promoted, losing urgency.

entries.title: Browser Tab Visual Similarity Merger
entries.notes: Uses Canvas screenshot + perceptual hashing to find visually duplicate tabs and merge them into one with a tab list. Lightweight, runs client-side. No existing tool does perceptual dedup for browser tabs.
entries.pain: Users accumulate dozens of tabs with near-identical content across windows, wasting mental load.

entries.title: API Response Schema Drift Sentinel
entries.notes: Captures live API responses and validates against imported OpenAPI/JSON Schema. Highlights new fields, missing fields, type changes. Built in 3 weeks with existing JSON Schema validators.
entries.pain: Backend changes break frontend apps silently when API response shapes diverge from contracts.

entries.title: Meeting Recording Chapter Auto-Generator
entries.notes: For Google Meet/Zoom local recordings, transcribes audio and segments into topical chapters with timestamps. Uses browser speech-to-text API. Gap: no extension auto-chapters local recordings.
entries.pain: RevOps teams manually chapter recorded calls for search, wasting hours per week.

entries.title: GCP Resource Carbon Intensity Overlay
entries.notes: Queries GCP billing export and maps Compute Engine usage to carbon intensity by region and time. Shows badge in browser. Simple build using GCP Cost Management APIs.
entries.pain: Developers lack visibility into cloud resource carbon footprint during day-to-day work.

entries.title: Sales Deck Slide Dwell Time Tracker
entries.notes: Logs active tab focus time while presenting PDF/HTML deck and generates a heatmap per slide. Uses Page Visibility API. Gap: no lightweight presenter analytics for sales decks.
entries.pain: AEs don't know which slides resonate or bore prospects during screen-share presentations.

entries.title: Browser Console API Call Mistake Detector
entries.notes: Injects runtime analyzer in console that flags missing error handling, wrong status code assumptions, and unhandled promise rejections. Lightweight AST parser.
entries.pain: Junior devs make common HTTP mistakes in frontend code that only surface in production.

entries.title: Notion Page External Link Health Monitor
entries.notes: Scrapes current Notion page, checks all external links for HTTP status, shows broken link badge inline. Scheduled rechecks. Niche gap: Notion-specific link rot checker doesn't exist.
entries.pain: Users embed hundreds of links in Notion pages that rot over time, creating dead end traps.

entries.title: Stripe Revenue Event Accounting Mapper
entries.notes: Listens to Stripe webhook events and generates a journal entry mapping for each payment, refund, subscription change. Exports CSV for accounting software. Gap: no browser-side Stripe-to-accounting bridge.
entries.pain: Finance teams struggle to map Stripe events to revenue recognition entries manually.

entries.title: Calendar Conflict Resolution Time-Slot Advisor
entries.notes: Reads Google Calendar free/busy blocks and suggests optimal meeting windows with timezone-aware overlay. Uses Calendar API. Simple but high-frequency pain.
entries.pain: Scheduling meetings across time zones requires manual back-and-forth that kills momentum.

entries.title: GitHub Issue Duplicate Cluster Detector
entries.notes: On GitHub issues page, uses embedding similarity to suggest existing issues that likely cover the same problem. Built with lightweight sentence embeddings. Niche gap: no GitHub-native duplicate detection.
entries.pain: Teams waste time on duplicate GitHub issues that could be merged with existing ones.

entries.title: Prospect Website Tech Stack Visualizer
entries.notes: On site load, fingerprints technology stack (CMS, analytics, hosting, CRM) from script tags and meta headers. Shows badge with stack icons. Built with Wappalyzer-style detection.
entries.pain: AEs visit prospect sites without knowing what tools they run, missing personalization hooks.
